01 · What we carry

Everything on the panel side of a repair.

Track your parcel

Track it here.

Enter your CN / consignment number and we'll open the live TCS status for your shipment.

Shows your live status instantly · works with TCS and other couriers
03 · How it works

Three steps, all on WhatsApp.

STEP 01

Send the part

A part number, a panel model, or just a photo of the board. We'll identify it.

STEP 02

Get your price

We reply with availability and your dealer price. No account, no sign-up.

STEP 03

Pay & we ship

Easypaisa, JazzCash or bank transfer. Dispatched to your city same day where possible.

DELIVERING VIA TCS
Lahore · Karachi · Islamabad · Rawalpindi · Faisalabad · Multan · Peshawar · Gujranwala · Sialkot · Hyderabad · Quetta · Sargodha · Bahawalpur — and every city TCS reaches.
